Export.zv: Cache for UNIX (Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86-64) 2014.1.3 (Build 775)
Export.Routine: DVPMEDS2 ;DALOI/BNT - Digital Veterans Platform FHIR Functions;5/19/2017 ;;1.0;DIGITAL VETERANS PLATFORM;****; ;;Per VHA Directive 2004-038, this routine should not be modified. ; ; External References DBIA# ; ------------------- ----- ; PSPT^PSNAPIS 2531 ; PSJING^PSNAPIS 2531 ; ^PS(50.606 2514 ; $$LOW^XLFSTR 10104 ; Q ; SRCHMEDS(SOURCE,TARGET) ; N PARAMS,RSLTCNT,RSLTARY,ID,MEDID,MEDI,I,ERR,LIST,CNT,CCNT,RECMAX,SMRY S (ID,RLSTCNT,ERR,CNT)=0,(I,MEDI)="",RSLTARY=$NA(^TMP("DVPTMP",$J)),RECMAX=100,SMRY=0 K @TARGET,@RSLTARY D GETPARMS^DVPUTL(.SOURCE,.PARAMS) ;clean out unused params D CLNPARAM^DVPUTLS ; ;***************************** ;code ;***************************** I $P($G(QUERYPAR("code")),U)="" G SKIP S MEDID=$P($G(QUERYPAR("code")),U) I MEDID="" D G EXIT . D OOERR^DVPERR(.TARGET,"error","required","MSG_RESOURCE_ID_MISSING","Medication Identifier is required.","SRCHMEDS^DVPMEDS1") I +MEDID>0 D G:ERR EXIT . I $O(^PSNDF(50.68,"AVUID",MEDID,I))'="" S I="",MEDID=$O(^PSNDF(50.68,"AVUID",MEDID,I)) Q . I $G(^PSNDF(50.68,MEDID,0))="" D . . I $O(^PSNDF(50.68,"AVUID",MEDID,I))="" D OOERR^DVPERR(.TARGET,"error","not-found","MSG_NO_MATCH","Medication not found for medicationId "_MEDID,"SRCHMEDS^DVPMEDS1") S ERR=1 Q I +MEDID=0 D G:ERR EXIT . S MEDI=$O(^PSNDF(50.68,"B",MEDID,MEDI)) . I MEDI=0 D OOERR^DVPERR(.TARGET,"error","not-found","MSG_NO_MATCH","Medication not found for medicationId "_MEDID,"RDALRG^DVPALL1") Q . S MEDID=MEDI N PAGING S @RSLTARY@(MEDID)=MEDID,@RSLTARY=1 D PAGING^DVPUTLS(@RSLTARY,.PAGING) G BLDEXIT ; SKIP ; ;create search array S (CNT,I)=0 F S I=$O(^PSNDF(50.68,"ANDC",I)) Q:+I=0 D . S CNT=CNT+1,@RSLTARY@(I)="",@RSLTARY=CNT ;and loop through it to search S (CNT,I)=0 F S I=$O(@RSLTARY@(I)) Q:+I=0 S CNT=CNT+1 D SEARCH(I) ; I @RSLTARY>0 D PAGING^DVPUTLS(@RSLTARY,.PAGING) G:$G(PAGING("OO")) EXIT I @RSLTARY<1 G EXIT ;S (PAGING("RSTART"),PAGING("REND"))=0 BLDEXIT ; ;Check _summary status S:$P($G(QUERYPAR("_summary")),U)="true" SMRY=1 ;Build the response I @RSLTARY>RECMAX,$P($G(QUERYPAR("page")),U)="",$P($G(QUERYPAR("count")),U)="" D . N NODE S PAGING("REND")=RECMAX,NODE=$NA(@TARGET@("results","warning","OperationOutcome","issue","severity")) . S @NODE@("severity")="warning" . S @NODE@("code")="too-costly" . S @NODE@("details")="" ; Operation Outcome Codes . S @NODE@("diagnostics")="The query returned too many records. The result will be trimmed to "_RECMAX_" records. Consider using paging." . S @NODE@("location")="SRCHMED^DVPMEDS2" S (RSLTCNT,CNT,CCNT)=0 F S RSLTCNT=$O(@RSLTARY@(RSLTCNT)) Q:CNT=PAGING("REND") D . S CNT=CNT+1 I CNT>=PAGING("RSTART"),CNT<=PAGING("REND") D . . N RES S RES=$O(@RSLTARY@(RSLTCNT)) S:RES="" RES=RSLTCNT D RDMEDS^DVPMEDS1(,,.RES,SMRY) S CCNT=CCNT+1 . . M @TARGET@("results","medications",CCNT)=RES ;and quit D MRGPGNG^DVPUTLS EXIT ; K @RSLTARY Q ; SEARCH(MEDID) ; N I,QUIT,NODE,MED0,UNIT S QUIT=0,NODE=$NA(^PSNDF(50.68,MEDID)),MED0=$G(@NODE@(0)) ; ;***************************** ;ingredient ;***************************** I $P($G(QUERYPAR("ingredient")),U)'="" D S:$P($G(QUERYPAR("ingredient")),U,2)="not" QUIT='QUIT I QUIT D UPDRSLT Q . K LIST D PSJING^PSNAPIS(,MEDID,.LIST) . S I=0,QUIT=1 F S I=$O(LIST(I)) Q:I="" D . . I $P($G(QUERYPAR("ingredient")),U)=$P(LIST(I),U,2) S QUIT=0 Q ; ;***************************** ;form ;***************************** I $P($G(QUERYPAR("form")),U)'="" D S:$P($G(QUERYPAR("form")),U,2)="not" QUIT='QUIT I QUIT D UPDRSLT Q . I $G(^PS(50.606,$P(MED0,U,3),0))'=$P($G(QUERYPAR("form")),U) S QUIT=1 ; ;***************************** ;status ;***************************** I $P($G(QUERYPAR("status")),U)'="" D S:$P($G(QUERYPAR("status")),U,2)="not" QUIT='QUIT I QUIT D UPDRSLT Q . N STS S STS=$S($P($G(@NODE@(7)),U,3)="":"active",$P($G(@NODE@(7)),U,3)'="":"inactive") . ;W STS,! . S:$P($G(QUERYPAR("status")),U)'=STS QUIT=1 ; ;***************************** ;container ;***************************** I $P($G(QUERYPAR("container")),U)'="" D S:$P($G(QUERYPAR("container")),U,2)="not" QUIT='QUIT I QUIT D UPDRSLT Q . K LIST D PSPT^PSNAPIS(,MEDID,.LIST) S I="",I=$O(LIST(I)) . I +I>0 I ($P(LIST(I),U,4)'=$P($G(QUERYPAR("container")),U)) S QUIT=1 . I I="" S QUIT=1 ; ;***************************** ;packageitem ;***************************** I $P($G(QUERYPAR("packageitem")),U)'="" D S:$P($G(QUERYPAR("packageitem")),U,2)="not" QUIT='QUIT I QUIT D UPDRSLT Q . I $P(MED0,U,3)="" S QUIT=1 Q . I $P(MED0,U,3) S QUIT=1 D . . S I=0,UNIT=$P($G(^PS(50.606,$P(MED0,U,3),"NOUN",1,0)),U) . . F S I=$O(^PS(50.606,$P(MED0,U,3),"UNIT",I)) Q:+I=0 D . . . I $P($G(^PS(50.606,$P(MED0,U,3),"UNIT",I,0)),U)_" "_UNIT=$P($G(QUERYPAR("packageitem")),U) S QUIT=0 Q ; Q ; UPDRSLT ; K @RSLTARY@(MEDID) S @RSLTARY=@RSLTARY-1 Q
